SYNTHETIC FIXTURE - NOT A RECORDED DEED. For parser testing only.
This fixture exercises the cardinal-bearing edge at azimuth 90 (due east) and
270 (due west).

Part of the Southwest Quarter of Section 33, Township 14 North, Range 1 West,
Hendricks County, Indiana, described as:

Beginning at the Point of Beginning;

thence due East, 500.00 feet;
thence due South, 250.00 feet;
thence due West, 500.00 feet;
thence due North, 250.00 feet to the Point of Beginning.
